equivalence_argument: No complete mapping: part of the concept exists through address-specific offsets, but the invariant names CLI/autonomous decoder coverage that is absent locally.

negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: The port has precompile-specific delivery config offsets for ZK, FHE, sovereign, and persistent agents, but no CLI-agent or autonomous-agent delivery config decoder symbols or branches are present in the audited repo set.
related_but_insufficient_code: crates/ethereum/payload/src/ritual_async.rs decode_delivery_config selects field offsets for current two-phase precompiles.
crates/ritual-precompile-addresses/src/lib.rs defines SOVEREIGN_AGENT_PRECOMPILE and PERSISTENT_AGENT_PRECOMPILE but no CLI_AGENT_PRECOMPILE or AUTONOMOUS_AGENT_PRECOMPILE symbol.
No from_cli_agent_abi or from_autonomous_agent_abi implementation was found locally.

notes: This records the local port shape rather than treating missing precompile names as not applicable.
rationale: The combined diff chooses DeliveryConfig::from_zk_abi, from_cli_agent_abi, from_autonomous_agent_abi, and from_fhe_abi based on contract_job.precompile_address before using the generic decoder. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: Phase 2 settlement creation must decode delivery configuration with the precompile-specific ABI for ZK, CLI agent, autonomous agent, and FHE precompiles, falling back to the generic delivery config only for other supported precompiles.
suggested_falsification_tests: For ZK, CLI agent, autonomous agent, and FHE inputs with distinct delivery-config field positions, assert create_delivery_settlement_transaction calls the matching decoder and rejects when that precompile's ABI layout is malformed.
summary: CLI/autonomous delivery config decoders are absent.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Encode CLI-agent and autonomous-agent Phase 2 inputs with distinct delivery-config locations and assert settlement creation uses the matching decoder; no such branches exist locally.
title: Precompile-specific delivery config decoders are used
